description_long: This is a young adult pedestrian with a casual urban appearance, featuring a tie-dye patterned t-shirt and fitted jeans. The individual has a medium build and stands upright with arms slightly outstretched. The hair is voluminous and curly, styled in a natural, rounded shape. The person is wearing athletic sneakers with thick soles, suitable for walking on city streets. The facial features are expressive, and the overall look is relaxed and approachable, fitting well into a modern urban environment. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A casually dressed young adult with a tie-dye t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers, standing upright with curly hair. The look is relaxed and urban.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tie-dye t-shirt, facial features, and both arms extended slightly outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the volume of the curly hair, and the side seam of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the t-shirt with the tie-dye pattern, the back of the jeans, and the hair's rounded shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair volume, and sneaker details.
